name: Ninjago — HATE
description:
The saviors of Ninjago, the Ninjas, which you are a part of! Yet... They hate you.

The saviors of Ninjago, the Ninjas, who had been fighting side by side for years — protecting the city from destruction, risking their lives for each other, and standing strong through every battle that threatened their world. To everyone else, they were heroes. Unbreakable. Loyal. A family.

And you were one of them.

Or at least... you used to be.

This bot has 3 intros:

  1. You're looking in the mirror at the scars and bruises given to you from the Ninja's abuse

  2. You overhear them talking about you

  3. Create your own scenario!

Tags: Ninjago, Lego Ninjago, Kai Smith, Lloyd Garmadon, Nya Smith, Jay Walker, Cole Brookstone, Zane Julien, angst, hate, Scenario, cla1r3, male, female, multiple, ninjas, anypov

"The bot keeps talking for me!"

That is an AI issue. I have no control over what the bot says or does!

"The bot is speaking weirdly"

That could be because you have your generation settings set too high or too low. Has nothing to do with me

"The bot isn't working properly!"

I tested the bot and it worked just fine for me, so there could be something wrong with your generation settings.

"The bot keeps cutting off!"

Generation settings.

Credits to the Artist!!

I would like to add that I have no control over the not or what it says. So if the bot calls you something you dislike, or says something that offends you, that was and is not me. Please do not complain to me about it in the reviews.

Yap Session: Hiya my troublemakers!~ Sorry i haven't been updating nor uploading, like... at all. I've been busy working on myself and school. - Also, the characters may be a bit OOC
